message:
Streaming packfile unpack: batch R2 flushes, O(1) delta lookups

- Flush compressed objects to R2 every 200 objects during parsing
  instead of buffering all writes until end (reduces peak memory)
- Replace O(n) objects.find() with Map lookups by hash and offset
  for delta base resolution
- Build object cache inline during parsing (no separate loop)
- Remove unused WasmEngine import
